SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class EventRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
public class EventRepository extends Object
The Class the manages the interactions between Event as a object in the program and as a document in the database

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    static final String

    static final String
    WAITLIST_STATUS_SNOOZED
     

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventRepository()
    creates the EventRepository object which is just references to the database the methods allows for access to Event documents in the database through Ids and event objects

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void>
    addComment(String eventId, com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, String text)
    Adds a new top-level comment to the specified event.
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void>
    addComment(String eventId, com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, String text, String parentCommentId, int depth)
    Adds a new comment to the specified event.
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void>
    assignCoorganizer(String eventId, String targetUid, String actingUid)
    assigns a user as a coorganizer for an Event and removes any waitlist entry they had for it
    static int
    calculateDrawCount(int candidatesSize, int maxParticipants, int alreadyChosenCount)
    calculates how many users should be drawn from the waitlist pool.
    static boolean
    canManageEvent(EventItem event, String uid)
    checks if the given user can manage a Event as the host or a coorganizer
    static boolean
    canUserAccessEvent(boolean isPublic, boolean canManage, boolean hasWaitlistEntry)
    determines event access for the current user
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Boolean>
    canUserAccessEvent(EventItem event, String eventId, String uid)
    determines whether a user can access an event detail screen for private events, access is granted to the host and to anyone who already has a waitlist record for the event
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Boolean>
    canUserManageEvent(EventItem event, String uid)
    determines whether a user can manage an event and organizer-only features
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Boolean>
    canUserManageOrganizerFeatures(String uid)
    checks whether the user can use organizer-only screens and actions
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String>
    createEvent(com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, EventItem draftEvent, android.net.Uri posterUri)
    Manages task of creating an event document in the database may also add a posterUri if there is one which it then also uploads the image file to the database
    static int
    decrementWaitlistCount(int currentCount)
    return a number 1 less than the argument unless negative then 0
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void>
    deleteComment(String eventId, String commentId)
    Soft-deletes a comment from an event while preserving the thread structure.
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<CommentItem>>
    getComments(String eventId)
    Loads all comments for the specified event and returns them in a flattened threaded order sorted by score.
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<UserProfile>>
    getConfirmedEntrantsForEvent(String eventId)
    gets all confirmed Entrants for a given Event
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<EventItem>>
    getCurrentEvents()
    Loads all active events in the database into a list of event objects
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Integer>
    getEntrantCount(String eventId, String statusFilter)
    returns the amount of entrants for a given status
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<UserProfile>>
    getEntrantsForEvent(String eventId, String statusFilter)
    gets the users who have signed up for the event Using event ID to access the database loads waitlist entries then the user data matching the entry to create userprofile objects
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<EventItem>
    getEventById(String eventId)
    Load the event from the database by its id and creates a respective event object
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<EventItem>>
    getHostedEvents(String hostUid)
    Load the a list event from the database for all events creator matching user ID and all events that the user coorganizes and creates a respective event object list
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<WaitlistEntryItem>>
    getMyWaitlists(String uid)
    get the all sign-up's a user has done for event Using user ID to access the database loads waitlist entries and creating WaitlistEntryItem objects
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String>
    getWaitlistStatus(String eventId, String uid)
    Check to see if there is a waitlist entry for a user signed up to an event and what that status is
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Boolean>
    hasUserCommentedOnEvent(String eventId, String uid)
    Determines whether the specified user has previously commented on an event.
    static int
    incrementWaitlistCount(int currentCount)
    return a number 1 more than the argument

    isCurrentEventVisible(boolean waitlistOpen, boolean deleted, boolean isPublic, Date eventDate, Date registrationDeadline, Date now)

    checks if the given user is the host of a Event

    isWaitlistJoinOpen(boolean waitlistOpen, Date registrationDeadline, Date now)

    joinWaitlist(String eventId, com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser)
    Updates the database to remove a user from an event waitlist
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void>
    leaveWaitlist(String eventId, String uid)
    Updates the database to remove a user from an event waitlist

    mergeManagedEvents(List<EventItem> hostedEvents, List<EventItem> coorganizedEvents)
    merges hosted Events and coorganized Events into one list without duplicates

    normalizeCoorganizers(Object rawCoorganizers)

    updates a waitlist entry object for a user signed up for an event status' into a new one.

  • Constructor Details

    • EventRepository

      public EventRepository()
      creates the EventRepository object which is just references to the database the methods allows for access to Event documents in the database through Ids and event objects

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentEvents

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<EventItem>> getCurrentEvents()
      Loads all active events in the database into a list of event objects
      Returns:
      task that reads the database for all match events and creates event object for them

    • getHostedEvents

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<EventItem>> getHostedEvents(@NonNull String hostUid)
      Load the a list event from the database for all events creator matching user ID and all events that the user coorganizes and creates a respective event object list
      Parameters:
      hostUid - ID of the user that manages the event
      Returns:
      task that gets all the events that the user manages as a list of event objects raises an exception of failure

    • getEventById

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<EventItem> getEventById(String eventId)
      Load the event from the database by its id and creates a respective event object
      Parameters:
      eventId - id of the Event
      Returns:
      a task that loads the event by Id into an event object and raises an exception if the task fails

    • createEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String> createEvent(@NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, @NonNull EventItem draftEvent, @Nullable android.net.Uri posterUri)
      Manages task of creating an event document in the database may also add a posterUri if there is one which it then also uploads the image file to the database
      Parameters:
      currentUser - current User document from database
      draftEvent - Event object to be added as a event document to the database
      posterUri - link the the event image
      Returns:
      appropriate task to create a new event document to the database depending on the situation that raises an exception it the task fails

    • getWaitlistStatus

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String> getWaitlistStatus(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String uid)
      Check to see if there is a waitlist entry for a user signed up to an event and what that status is
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of the Event
      uid - Id of the user
      Returns:
      Task that tries to obtains a waitlist entry matching the argument id's and returns result if found

    • canUserAccessEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Boolean> canUserAccessEvent(@NonNull EventItem event, @NonNull String eventId, @Nullable String uid)
      determines whether a user can access an event detail screen for private events, access is granted to the host and to anyone who already has a waitlist record for the event
      Parameters:
      event - event being accessed
      eventId - id of the event
      uid - current user id
      Returns:
      task resolving to whether the user can view the event

    • canUserManageEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Boolean> canUserManageEvent(@NonNull EventItem event, @Nullable String uid)
      determines whether a user can manage an event and organizer-only features
      Parameters:
      event - event being managed
      uid - current user id
      Returns:
      task resolving to whether the user can manage the event

    • canUserManageOrganizerFeatures

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Boolean> canUserManageOrganizerFeatures(@Nullable String uid)
      checks whether the user can use organizer-only screens and actions
      Parameters:
      uid - current user id
      Returns:
      task resolving to whether the user is active for organizer features

    • assignCoorganizer

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> assignCoorganizer(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String targetUid, @NonNull String actingUid)
      assigns a user as a coorganizer for an Event and removes any waitlist entry they had for it
      Parameters:
      eventId - the String id of the Event
      targetUid - the String uid of the user being assigned
      actingUid - the String uid of the host assigning the coorganizer
      Returns:
      a Task that updates the Event and removes matching waitlist entries

    • updateWaitlistStatus

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> updateWaitlistStatus(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String uid, @NonNull String status)
      updates a waitlist entry object for a user signed up for an event status' into a new one.
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of the Event
      uid - Id of the user
      status - new status to update the User to
      Returns:
      a Task updates the change in the database

    • joinWaitlist

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> joinWaitlist(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser)
      Updates the database to remove a user from an event waitlist
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of event that was signed up
      currentUser - current User document from database
      Returns:
      Task that removes the waitlist document from the user and event documents

    • leaveWaitlist

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> leaveWaitlist(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String uid)
      Updates the database to remove a user from an event waitlist
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of event that was signed up
      uid - Id of the signed up user
      Returns:
      Task that removes the waitlist document from the user and event

    • getMyWaitlists

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<WaitlistEntryItem>> getMyWaitlists(@NonNull String uid)
      get the all sign-up's a user has done for event Using user ID to access the database loads waitlist entries and creating WaitlistEntryItem objects
      Parameters:
      uid - Id of the User
      Returns:
      Task that obtains the all WaitlistEntryItem corresponding to the user

    • getEntrantCount

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Integer> getEntrantCount(@NonNull String eventId, @Nullable String statusFilter)
      returns the amount of entrants for a given status
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of the event
      statusFilter - the string name of status (ie chosen)
      Returns:
      a task the queries the data base for waitlist entries matching the status and counts them

    • getEntrantsForEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<UserProfile>> getEntrantsForEvent(@NonNull String eventId, @Nullable String statusFilter)
      gets the users who have signed up for the event Using event ID to access the database loads waitlist entries then the user data matching the entry to create userprofile objects
      Parameters:
      eventId - ID of the event
      statusFilter - also filers for only users of a matching status of acceptance
      Returns:
      Task that obtains the user profiles of user who have signed-up to the waitlist (or other stage of acceptance to event)

    • getConfirmedEntrantsForEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<UserProfile>> getConfirmedEntrantsForEvent(@NonNull String eventId)
      gets all confirmed Entrants for a given Event
      Parameters:
      eventId - the String id of the Event
      Returns:
      a Task containing the list of confirmed UserProfiles for the Event

    • performLotteryDraw

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> performLotteryDraw(String eventId, String winningMessage)
      Performs lottery draw by moving random users from IN_WAITLIST to CHOSEN. Selects up to maxParticipants winners from the pool of users who are IN_WAITLIST. Updates status in both event and user records and notifies the selected users with WINNING notification.
      Parameters:
      eventId - ID of the event to perform the draw for
      winningMessage - message to be sent to users selected in the lottery
      Returns:
      Task that completes when the draw and notifications are finished

    • calculateDrawCount

      public static int calculateDrawCount(int candidatesSize, int maxParticipants, int alreadyChosenCount)
      calculates how many users should be drawn from the waitlist pool. Generalized helper function to aid with testing
      Parameters:
      candidatesSize - number of users currently in the waitlist
      maxParticipants - maximum allowed winners for the event
      alreadyChosenCount - number of users already in a winning or confirmed state
      Returns:
      The number of slots to fill in this draw

    • processExpiredWinners

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> processExpiredWinners(String eventId, String winningMessage)
      Removes all chosen or snoozed entrants and replaces them. Triggers a redraw to fill vacated spots.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event to process expired winners from
      winningMessage - The message to be sent to users selected in the lottery.
      Returns:
      task that completes after expired winners are processed and any replacement draws finish

    • processExpiredWinners

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> processExpiredWinners(String eventId, String winningMessage, long currentTimeMillis)
      Helper method for processExpiredWinners kept for testing compatibility.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event to process chosen or snoozed winners from
      winningMessage - The message to be sent to users selected in the lottery.
      currentTimeMillis - The current time in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      task that completes after chosen or snoozed winners are processed and any replacement draws finish

    • updateEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String> updateEvent(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, @NonNull EventItem event, @Nullable android.net.Uri posterUri)
      Manages task of updating an Event into the database update the Event document, and posterUri if there is one which also uploads the image file to the database
      Parameters:
      eventId - ID of the Event to be updated
      currentUser - Event Creator (current User) document from database
      event - Event object with new data
      posterUri - link to the Event picture
      Returns:
      appropriate task to update the database depending on the situation that raises an exception it the task fails

    • readEventItem

      @NonNull public EventItem readEventItem(@NonNull com.google.firebase.firestore.DocumentSnapshot doc)
      reads in a Event document in the database into an Event object
      Parameters:
      doc - a reference to Event document in the database
      Returns:
      a created Event object with the data from the document

    • isWaitlistJoinOpen

      public static boolean isWaitlistJoinOpen(boolean waitlistOpen, @Nullable Date registrationDeadline, @NonNull Date now)
      returns whether the (is waitlist open and it is before the deadline)
      Parameters:
      waitlistOpen - whether the waitlist is allowing sign-ups
      registrationDeadline - deadline of when sign-ups close
      now - time right now
      Returns:
      if is is okay to sign-up for the event

    • isCurrentEventVisible

      public static boolean isCurrentEventVisible(boolean waitlistOpen, boolean deleted, boolean isPublic, @Nullable Date eventDate, @Nullable Date registrationDeadline, @NonNull Date now)
      returns whether an event should be visible on the current events screen
      Parameters:
      waitlistOpen - whether the waitlist is allowing sign-ups
      deleted - whether the event is deleted
      isPublic - whether the event is public
      eventDate - when the event occurs
      registrationDeadline - when sign-ups close
      now - current time
      Returns:
      whether the event belongs on the current public events list

    • canUserAccessEvent

      public static boolean canUserAccessEvent(boolean isPublic, boolean canManage, boolean hasWaitlistEntry)
      determines event access for the current user
      Parameters:
      isPublic - whether the event is public
      canManage - whether the current user can manage the event
      hasWaitlistEntry - whether the current user already has an event waitlist record
      Returns:
      whether the user can view the event

    • isHost

      public static boolean isHost(@NonNull EventItem event, @Nullable String uid)
      checks if the given user is the host of a Event
      Parameters:
      event - the Event being checked
      uid - the String uid of the user
      Returns:
      true if the user is the host of the Event

    • canManageEvent

      public static boolean canManageEvent(@NonNull EventItem event, @Nullable String uid)
      checks if the given user can manage a Event as the host or a coorganizer
      Parameters:
      event - the Event being checked
      uid - the String uid of the user
      Returns:
      true if the user can manage the Event

    • mergeManagedEvents

      @NonNull public static List<EventItem> mergeManagedEvents(@NonNull List<EventItem> hostedEvents, @NonNull List<EventItem> coorganizedEvents)
      merges hosted Events and coorganized Events into one list without duplicates
      Parameters:
      hostedEvents - the list of Events hosted by the user
      coorganizedEvents - the list of Events coorganized by the user
      Returns:
      a sorted list of managed Events without duplicates

    • incrementWaitlistCount

      public static int incrementWaitlistCount(int currentCount)
      return a number 1 more than the argument
      Parameters:
      currentCount - int to be incremented
      Returns:
      int currentCount incremented by 1

    • decrementWaitlistCount

      public static int decrementWaitlistCount(int currentCount)
      return a number 1 less than the argument unless negative then 0
      Parameters:
      currentCount - int to be decremented
      Returns:
      int currentCount after decrementing by 1

    • normalizeKeywords

      @NonNull public static List<String> normalizeKeywords(@Nullable Object rawKeywords)
      normalizes keywords read from user input or firestore
      Parameters:
      rawKeywords - raw keyword list
      Returns:
      trimmed keyword list without duplicates or blanks

    • normalizeCoorganizers

      @NonNull public static List<String> normalizeCoorganizers(@Nullable Object rawCoorganizers)
      normalizes coorganizer user ids read from user input or firestore
      Parameters:
      rawCoorganizers - raw coorganizer user id list
      Returns:
      trimmed coorganizer user ids without duplicates or blanks

    • normalizeIsPublic

      public static boolean normalizeIsPublic(@Nullable Boolean isPublicValue)
      normalizes the stored public flag for legacy events without the field
      Parameters:
      isPublicValue - stored public flag
      Returns:
      true when the field is missing, otherwise the stored value

    • addComment

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> addComment(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, @NonNull String text, @Nullable String parentCommentId, int depth)
      Adds a new comment to the specified event.

      This method supports both top-level comments and replies.

      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event receiving the comment
      currentUser - the signed-in user posting the comment
      text - the comment text to post
      parentCommentId - the parent comment ID, or an empty string for a top-level comment
      depth - the nesting depth for the comment
      Returns:
      a task representing the result of the comment write operation

    • addComment

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> addComment(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, @NonNull String text)
      Adds a new top-level comment to the specified event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event receiving the comment
      currentUser - the signed-in user posting the comment
      text - the comment text to post
      Returns:
      a task representing the result of the comment write operation

    • deleteComment

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> deleteComment(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String commentId)
      Soft-deletes a comment from an event while preserving the thread structure.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event containing the comment
      commentId - the ID of the comment to delete
      Returns:
      a task representing the update operation

    • getComments

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<CommentItem>> getComments(@NonNull String eventId)
      Loads all comments for the specified event and returns them in a flattened threaded order sorted by score.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event whose comments should be loaded
      Returns:
      a task containing the threaded list of comments for the event

    • voteOnComment

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> voteOnComment(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String commentId, @NonNull String uid, int newVoteValue)
      Applies an upvote or downvote to a comment for the specified user.

      If the same vote is applied twice, the vote is removed.

      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event containing the comment
      commentId - the ID of the comment being voted on
      uid - the user ID of the voter
      newVoteValue - the requested vote value, either 1 or -1
      Returns:
      a task representing the transaction result

    • hasUserCommentedOnEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Boolean> hasUserCommentedOnEvent(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String uid)
      Determines whether the specified user has previously commented on an event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event
      uid - the ID of the user
      Returns:
      a task resolving to true if the user has at least one comment on the event
